metadata.author: RailDesign Local MVP fetch_tomix_catalog.py
metadata.notes: Base standards from TOMIX introduction page: length 140mm, roadbed width 18.5mm, double-track spacing 37mm, reference curve radius 280mm. Product geometry is parsed from product names where possible. Turnouts/accessories need further verification.

fetchedCategories.label: Super mini and mini curve rails
